title: LIBWYS 2 Pack 350ml Double Walled Coffee Cups Glasses Mugs with 2 Spoons, Cappuccino Latte Tea Cups with Handle, Heat Resistant Cup Drinking Glasses
features: ☕DOUBLE-WALLED DESIGN - LIBWYS glass coffee cups are double-walled and have an excellent thermal insulation effect, which helps keep your drinking hotter or colder for longer than standard glass, while it is not too hot against your fingers or cold drinks freezing your hands.

☕FOOD-GRADE BOROSILICATE GLASS - The coffee glasses 350 ml is made of heat and condensation-resistant borosilicate glass, accept temperature from -30℃ to 150℃, and are very robust than other normal glass mugs. TIPS: hand wash is recommended.

☕EASY TO HOLD - The coffee glasses are lightweight, the handles are a perfect size, and do not cause discomfort to hold. It is very easy to use for enjoying Latte, Cappuccino, Espresso, tea, smoothie, beer, juice, ice cream, and other hot or cold beverages.

☕SET OF 2 350ML GLASSES CUPS - Double-walled coffee glasses are designed with an exquisite package and are also a perfect gift choice for Christmas, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, and housewarmings. LIBWYS coffee glasses set is highly recommended for coffee lovers.
☕PROMISE - 2 coffee glasses mugs + 2 spoons. If the product appears damaged, you can always contact us and get a free return or refund within 180 days.

Hello, if you receive a parcel with broken cups or missing cups, you can be sure that we will offer you a satisfactory solution.
